results.resolved_title: The HopPtoF locus of Pseudomonas syringae pv. tomato DC3000 encodes a type III chaperone and a cognate effector.
results.note: Paper is specifically about the HopPtoF (HopF) locus; full text paywalled (403). AvrE1 not in abstract; absence from unretrievable full text = INACCESSIBLE.

results.resolved_title: The HopPtoF locus of Pseudomonas syringae pv. tomato DC3000 encodes a type III chaperone and a cognate effector.
results.quote: ShcF(Pto) and HopF(Pto), that are preceded by a single hrp box promoter. We present evidence here to show that ShcF(Pto) and HopF(Pto) encode a type III chaperone and a cognate effector, respectively.
results.note: HopF(Pto)=HopF2 in P. syringae pv. tomato DC3000; abstract names it as a T3SS cognate effector. Organism matches.

results.resolved_title: VgrG and PAAR Proteins Define Distinct Versions of a Functional Type VI Secretion System
results.note: Full text is entirely about Serratia marcescens Db10/Db11 T6SS. No mention of Tse4, PA2774, Pseudomonas aeruginosa, or PAO1 (0 hits in full text). Paper makes no claim about the P. aeruginosa effector Tse4.

results.resolved_title: VgrG and PAAR Proteins Define Distinct Versions of a Functional Type VI Secretion System
results.quote: being eliminated in the Δmutant and therefore confirming that Slp is a new T6SS-delivered antibacterial effector.
results.note: Slp = SMDB11_0927 in Serratia marcescens (paper's organism; batch organism blank, no conflict). Named as VgrG2-dependent T6SS effector (phospholipase).

results.resolved_title: The Type III Secretion Chaperone Slc1 Engages Multiple Early Effectors, Including TepP, a Tyrosine-phosphorylated Protein Required for the Recruitment of CrkI-II to Nascent Inclusions and Innate Immune Signaling
results.quote: We identified Ct875, a new Slc1 client protein and T3S effector, which we renamed TepP
results.note: Ct875 = CT875 in Chlamydia trachomatis; named as a T3S effector. Organism and system match.

results.resolved_title: The Legionella effector RidL inhibits retrograde trafficking to promote intracellular replication.
results.quote: We show that the T4SS effector RidL localizes to LCVs, supports intracellular bacterial growth, and alters retrograde trafficking
results.note: RidL = lpg2311 in Legionella pneumophila; named as a T4SS (Dot/Icm) effector. Organism and system match.
